title: Humsafar Coaches
contentHtml:
GPS based Passenger information display as per existing RDSO specification No. RDSO/PE/SPEC/AC/0087-2008(Rev-1).

 

Fire and Smoke detection and suppression system.

CCTV system.

Mobile laptop charging points as per existing RDSO scheme.

Integrated Braille displays.

 

Improved aesthetics with new interior and exterior color scheme presenting a futuristic look with the use of Vinyl sheets similar to Maharaja Express Coaches.
contentMarkdown:
![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/humsafar.jpg)

GPS based Passenger information display as per existing RDSO specification No. RDSO/PE/SPEC/AC/0087-2008(Rev-1).

![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/GPS_based_passenger_info_display(1).jpg)

Fire and Smoke detection and suppression system.

![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/Fire_smoke_detection.jpg)

CCTV system.

![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/CCTV.jpg)![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/CCTV_display.jpg)

Mobile laptop charging points as per existing RDSO scheme.

![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/charging_point_laptop.jpg)

Integrated Braille displays.

Improved aesthetics with new interior and exterior color scheme presenting a futuristic look with the use of Vinyl sheets similar to Maharaja Express Coaches.

![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/humsafar_exterior.jpg)
